Do not edit this file directly. -->  # VER-QUIC-CRT-0005 - QUIC Connection Runtime Path State and Migration Verification  ## Scope  This slice covers active-path and candidate-path orchestration, address-change classification, validation gating, amplification accounting, and promotion semantics. It does not prove a generalized multipath scheduler or the full cache-eviction policy for recently validated paths.  ## Requirements Verified  - REQ-QUIC-CRT-0033 - REQ-QUIC-CRT-0059 - REQ-QUIC-CRT-0060 - REQ-QUIC-CRT-0063 - REQ-QUIC-CRT-0064 - REQ-QUIC-CRT-0065 - REQ-QUIC-CRT-0066 - REQ-QUIC-CRT-0067 - REQ-QUIC-CRT-0068 - REQ-QUIC-CRT-0069 - REQ-QUIC-CRT-0070  ## Verification Method  Focused requirement-home tests combined with inspection evidence from the runtime path classifier, path record model, validation state, and promotion effects.  ## Preconditions  - The Incursa.Quic solution builds successfully. - The CRT requirement traits are discoverable by the test runner. - The runtime exposes explicit path identity, candidate-path, validation, and amplification state.  ## Procedure or Approach  - Inspect the runtime path record model and validation helpers for explicit identity, validation, and amplification state. - Run the requirement-home tests for REQ-QUIC-CRT-0063, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0064, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0066, and REQ-QUIC-CRT-0069. - Confirm the transition results show candidate creation, handshake-gated promotion, and budget-checked sends.  ## Expected Result  A packet from a new address is classified explicitly, candidate paths are created with validation and amplification state, successful validation promotes only when the handshake gate allows it, and unvalidated-path sends respect amplification limits.  ## Evidence  - tests/Incursa.Quic.Tests/RequirementHomes/CRT/REQ-QUIC-CRT-0032.cs - tests/Incursa.Quic.Tests/RequirementHomes/CRT/REQ-QUIC-CRT-0063.cs - tests/Incursa.Quic.Tests/RequirementHomes/CRT/REQ-QUIC-CRT-0064.cs - tests/Incursa.Quic.Tests/RequirementHomes/CRT/REQ-QUIC-CRT-0066.cs - tests/Incursa.Quic.Tests/RequirementHomes/CRT/REQ-QUIC-CRT-0069.cs - src/Incursa.Quic/QuicConnectionRuntime.cs - src/Incursa.Quic/QuicConnectionRuntimeStateModels.cs - src/Incursa.Quic/QuicConnectionRuntimeEventModels.cs - src/Incursa.Quic/QuicPathValidation.cs - src/Incursa.Quic/QuicAntiAmplificationBudget.cs  ## Status  planned  ## Related Artifacts  - SPEC-QUIC-CRT - ARC-QUIC-CRT-0005 - WI-QUIC-CRT-0005  ## Status Summary  The focused tests now cover candidate-path creation, handshake-gated promotion, address validation reuse, and unvalidated-path amplification budgeting. The bounded recently validated cache and any broader migration recovery policy remain documented in the design but are not directly exercised by these tests.
